name: 无首铁驭
weakness: 引擎部位蓝光预警信号，1.5秒红色预警光效时闪避
weaknessEn: Blue glow on engine, dodge during 1.5s red warning flash
mechanics: 正面撞击50%最大生命值伤害；中期场地生成回血花苞；护盾击破后3秒不可行动
mechanicsEn: Frontal collision deals 50% max HP; mid-fight spawns healing buds; 3s stun after shield break
location: 未闻浦Z42环海公路（夜间触发追逐战）
locationEn: Z42 Coastal Highway, Weimenpu (night chase event)
appearance: 身穿黑色机车服，骑乘燃烧火焰的摩托车，附带黑焰轨迹
strategy: 护盾击破后3秒不可行动期间全力输出，注意闪避正面撞击
strategyEn: Full DPS during 3s stun after shield break, dodge frontal collisions

name: 黑之书
weakness: 激光中断后约2秒僵直期（近战爆发窗口）；蹲伏/跳跃可完全规避激光
weaknessEn: ~2s stun after laser interrupt (melee burst window); crouch/jump to dodge lasers
mechanics: 单向持续激光束触发强制定身；旋转扫射阶段覆盖角度广
mechanicsEn: Continuous laser beam forces immobilization; sweeping laser covers wide angle
appearance: 悬浮古籍形态，主攻击为持续激光束
strategy: 绕背走位压缩激光瞄准时间，高频位移削减生命值
strategyEn: Circle behind to reduce laser tracking time, use high mobility to chip HP

name: 墨菲克斯
weakness: 第一阶段保持安全距离（长尾横扫判定范围大）；第二阶段切换远程输出
weaknessEn: Phase 1: keep distance (tail sweep has large hitbox); Phase 2: switch to ranged DPS
mechanics: 第一阶段地面近战形态（长尾横扫+击飞）；第二阶段升空展开双翼进行远程范围轰炸
mechanicsEn: Phase 1: grounded melee (tail sweep + launch); Phase 2: airborne dual-wing ranged bombardment
strategy: 第一阶段保持距离输出，第二阶段切换远程角色维持中远距离DPS
strategyEn: Phase 1: keep distance and DPS; Phase 2: switch to ranged characters for mid-long range DPS

name: 海囚
weakness: 需观察形态切换规律，注意全图AOE与高速单体连击切换
weaknessEn: Observe form-switching patterns; watch for full-map AOE and high-speed single-target combos
mechanics: 全程多次形态切换：全图AOE压制技 + 高速单体连击两种模式
mechanicsEn: Multiple form switches throughout: full-map AOE suppression + high-speed single-target combos
strategy: 中后期核心资源来源，需高熟练度和资源管理
strategyEn: Core endgame resource source, requires high skill and resource management

name: 斑蝶
weakness: 地面阴影/气流预判落点；水面波纹预警信号
weaknessEn: Ground shadows/air currents predict landing; water ripples as warning
mechanics: 第一阶段（满血~60%）攻击节奏缓；第二阶段（~40%）位移范围加大；最终阶段（<20%）最高难度
mechanicsEn: Phase 1 (100-60%): slow pace; Phase 2 (~40%): wider movement; Final (<20%): highest difficulty
appearance: 高空俯冲与水面潜行伏击型Boss
strategy: 阶段节奏把控+异象系统打断+规避水面突袭
strategyEn: Phase rhythm control + anomaly system interrupts + dodge water ambushes

name: 雨人
hp: 本体+3把悬浮雨伞(每把约1.2万HP)
weakness: 三把悬浮雨伞全部破除后本体显形
weaknessEn: Destroy all 3 floating umbrellas (~12K HP each) to expose main body
mechanics: 伪装成雨伞；非雨夜靠近拖入雨巷异空间；地面生成减速水洼
mechanicsEn: Disguised as umbrella; drags player into Rain Alley dimension; spawns slowing puddles
appearance: 伪装成悬浮雨伞的异象
strategy: 速射伞骨连接点，显形后大招直击核心可跳过二阶段
strategyEn: Rapid-fire umbrella joints; after exposure, ultimate to core skips phase 2

name: 波普
weakness: 火属性点燃周边三处涂鸦逼其脱离墙体
weaknessEn: Fire element ignites 3 nearby graffiti to force it off walls
mechanics: 免疫普通攻击；藏匿于街头涂鸦墙
mechanicsEn: Immune to normal attacks; hides in street graffiti walls
strategy: 火系角色点燃涂鸦逼出，预判路径放置重击造成硬直
strategyEn: Fire characters ignite graffiti to flush out; predict path for stagger

name: 欧拉拳套
weakness: 三阶段蓄力红光时侧闪触发子弹时间
weaknessEn: Side-step during Phase 3 red charge for bullet time
mechanics: 连胜三场擂台赛；低血量进入狂暴状态
mechanicsEn: 3-round arena fight; enters berserk mode at low HP
strategy: 前两场保留闪避值，第三场蓄力红光时侧闪后三段破防+异能环合增伤
strategyEn: Save dodge in rounds 1-2; round 3 side-step red charge, then 3-hit break + ring fusion boost

name: 灵感终结者
weakness: 五个伴蜂鸣声的灵感容器全部摧毁后本体虚弱
weaknessEn: Destroy all 5 buzzing inspiration containers to weaken main body
mechanics: 蚊虫状寄生体吸附市民头部吸食灵感；满额后隐身藏匿
mechanicsEn: Mosquito-like parasites attach to citizens to drain inspiration; goes invisible when full
locationEn: DSD Toy Store attic and other areas
strategy: 灵视扫描追踪能量轨迹，破坏五个容器后速杀防二次传送
strategyEn: Spirit vision scan to track energy trails, destroy 5 containers, fast kill to prevent teleport

name: 绷带怪
weakness: 高警觉度但有明确巡逻逻辑
weaknessEn: High alertness but predictable patrol pattern
mechanics: 存在于废弃医院区域；全楼通电完成瞬间、同一类型线索收集满三件时触发
mechanicsEn: Found in abandoned hospital; triggers on power restoration or collecting 3 same-type clues
location: 废弃医院（噩梦缠身委托）
strategy: 通电后闪身至配电箱后方规避，利用环境交互
strategyEn: Hide behind electrical box after power-on, use environmental interactions

name: 拖车艄
location: Z20环海公路中段废弃加油站附近弯道
locationEn: Z20 Coastal Highway mid-section, near abandoned gas station curve
mechanics: 进入区域自动触发，标志性随机异象玩法
mechanicsEn: Auto-triggered on entering area, iconic random anomaly encounter

name: 棉绒绒
location: 便利店后方垃圾堆旁（任务触发）
locationEn: Behind convenience store trash pile (quest triggered)
mechanics: NPC埃里克对话接取魔法传送装置任务后出现
mechanicsEn: Appears after accepting Magic Teleporter quest from NPC Eric
